items.title: Long Easy Run
items.description: Run 12 km at an easy pace of 6:30-7:00 min/km. Maintain a heart rate in Zone 2 (130-150 bpm).

items.title: Tempo Run
items.description: Run 6 km with 4 km at a tempo pace of 5:30-5:45 min/km. Start with 2 km easy (7:00 min/km) and finish with 1 km cool down. Aim for a heart rate of 160-175 bpm during the tempo segment.

items.title: Interval Training
items.description: Warm up for 10 minutes, then perform 6x400m intervals at 4:45 min/km pace with 2 minutes recovery jog between each. Cool down for 10 minutes. Target heart rate during intervals should be 170-180 bpm.

items.title: Recovery Run
items.description: Run 5 km at a very easy pace of 7:30-8:00 min/km. Keep your heart rate below 140 bpm to aid recovery.
